allow: Bash(node -e "const a = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); console.log\('SDK loaded'\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}\); c.messages.create\({model:'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022',max_tokens:10,messages:[{role:'user',content:'hi'}]}\).then\(r=>console.log\('SUCCESS:',r.model\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('ERROR:',e.status, e.message\)\)")
